data.body: DONE: heedless-caloric-pikeperch LANDED ON MAIN. All 13 Gerrit changes (411-423) MERGED atomically via submit of the top change; replicated to GitHub origin/main. Required a rebase onto an advanced main (13 new commits incl a reducer _replay.py refactor + reconciler changes) — resolved test-file conflicts, regenerated docs/env-vars.md for the new env reads, full make test green. One CI flake (could not parse HEAD git-race) cleared with recheck. All 13 children + epic closed+signed earlier. Epic complete.
